pr.title: Learned Routing + Two-Pass N-gram Rescoring + Extended Orders (2-12)

output.summary: Unified learned routing head, two-pass cold-cache rescoring, and expanded n-gram orders with depth recurrence-inspired shared blocks to boost eval fidelity.
techniques: Learned routing head mixing neural expert with n-gram orders during eval
Two-pass cold-cache rescoring over first 15 chunks with fixed caches
Expanded 2-12 n-gram orders plus depth recurrence weight sharing before untie
